question: What is the surname of the equine veterinarian mentioned in 1.E Exercises from the chemistry materials licensed by Marisa Alviar-Agnew & Henry Agnew under the CK-12 license in LibreText's Introductory Chemistry materials as compiled 08/21/2023?

research_queries: LibreTexts Introductory Chemistry Marisa Alviar-Agnew Henry Agnew CK-12 license
Marisa Alviar-Agnew Henry Agnew chemistry textbook 08/21/2023 compilation
CK-12 license chemistry materials LibreTexts equine veterinarian surname
working_plan: Search for LibreTexts Introductory Chemistry materials by Marisa Alviar-Agnew & Henry Agnew
Navigate to the specific textbook and locate section 1.E Exercises
Search within that section for any mention of an equine veterinarian
Extract the surname of the mentioned equine veterinarian
Verify the information matches the 08/21/2023 compilation date requirement

solver.reasoning_summary: Found the specific LibreTexts Introductory Chemistry 1.E: Exercises page authored by Marisa Alviar-Agnew & Henry Agnew under CK-12 license. In the section about Pasteur's anthrax experiments, there is a clear reference to 'a horse doctor in eastern France named Louvrier' who claimed to have invented a cure for anthrax around 1876. A horse doctor is an equine veterinarian, making Louvrier the surname of the equine veterinarian mentioned in the exercises.

tool_calls.name: sandbox_exec

arguments.code:
# Search for all mentions of veterinarian, horse, equine, or animal doctor in the text
text = """During Pasteur's time, anthrax was a widespread and disastrous disease for livestock. Many people whose livelihood was raising livestock lost large portions of their herds to this disease. Around 1876, a horse doctor in eastern France named Louvrier, claimed to have invented a cure for anthrax."""

# Search for keywords related to equine veterinarian
keywords = ['veterinarian', 'horse', 'equine', 'vet', 'doctor', 'Louvrier']
found_terms = []

for keyword in keywords:
    if keyword.lower() in text.lower():
        found_terms.append(keyword)
        print(f"Found '{keyword}' in text")

# Extract the specific passage about the horse doctor
if "horse doctor" in text.lower():
    print("\nFound passage about horse doctor:")
    start = text.lower().find("around 1876")
    end = text.lower().find("anthrax.", start) + len("anthrax.")
    relevant_passage = text[start:end]
    print(relevant_passage)
    
    # Extract the name
    if "named" in relevant_passage.lower():
        name_start = relevant_passage.lower().find("named") + 6
        name_end = relevant_passage.find(",", name_start)
        name = relevant_passage[name_start:name_end].strip()
        print(f"\nExtracted name: {name}")
